title: French-Style Roasted Beef
description: A classic French dish featuring tender beef, roasted to perfection.

ingredients.name: Beef, roast (3-4 lbs)
ingredients.notes: Choose a cut suitable for roasting, such as prime rib or round

instructions: Season the beef with salt and pepper.
Heat butter in a large skillet over medium-high. Sear the beef until browned on all sides.
Transfer the beef to a roasting pan and set aside.
Toss carrots and potatoes with garlic, salt, and pepper in a separate bowl.
Add the vegetables to the roasting pan with the beef.
Roast in the preheated oven for 20 minutes.
Reduce oven temperature to 325°F (165°C) and continue roasting for an additional 20-25 minutes, or until the beef reaches your desired level of doneness.
Let the beef rest for 10-15 minutes before slicing and serving.
